what: Visualization functions for the hospitraceR package
title: Visualization functions for the hospitraceR package
text: Visualization functions hospitraceR package, provides tools analyzing transmission clusters healthcare settings using genomic data. package handles plotting: phylogenetic trees combined per-patient location traces, cluster comparison heatmaps, overlap permutation-test figures, genetic-context summaries. [!WARNING] project still early stages development API may change without notice.

title: Visualization functions for the hospitraceR package
text: hospitraceRVisualize available CRAN yet, can install GitHub using devtools:

title: Visualization functions for the hospitraceR package
text: full function reference available package documentation, detailed examples vignettes, please visit main documentation site hospitraceR.

what: Per-cluster maximum intra-cluster SNP distance. — cluster_max_intra_distances
title: Per-cluster maximum intra-cluster SNP distance. — cluster_max_intra_distances
text: Drops singletons computes, remaining cluster, maximum within-cluster distance via hospitraceR::cluster_pairwise_distances(). Clusters visited sort(unique(...)) order hospitraceR::cluster_inter_distances(), result lines row--row matrix two can plotted directly .

title: Per-cluster maximum intra-cluster SNP distance. — cluster_max_intra_distances
Per-cluster maximum intra-cluster SNP distance. — cluster_max_intra_distances
text: clusters vector named sequence IDs giving cluster sequence belongs . snp_dist matrix SNP distances isolates.

title: Per-cluster maximum intra-cluster SNP distance. — cluster_max_intra_distances
text: named numeric vector max intra-cluster distances, one per non-singleton cluster.

what: Maps clusters onto a phylogenetic tree and visualizes them — plot_clusters_phylo
title: Maps clusters onto a phylogenetic tree and visualizes them — plot_clusters_phylo
text: Maps clusters onto phylogenetic tree visualizes

title: Maps clusters onto a phylogenetic tree and visualizes them — plot_clusters_phylo
code: plot_clusters_phylo(   tree,   clusters,   seq2pt = NULL,   dna_var = NULL,   patient_label = FALSE,   convert_status = FALSE,   ip_seqs = NULL,   dates = NULL,   pt_trace = NULL )

title: Maps clusters onto a phylogenetic tree and visualizes them — plot_clusters_phylo
text: tree phylogenetic tree object class phylo. clusters vector named sequence IDs values indicating cluster (subtree) sequence belongs . seq2pt OPTIONAL. named vector mapping sequence IDs patient IDs. Default NULL – patient labels added tree. dna_var OPTIONAL. DNA alignment object class DNAbin. Default NULL – variants plotted. patient_label OPTIONAL. logical value indicating whether add patient labels tree. Default FALSE – patient labels added tree. convert_status OPTIONAL. logical value indicating whether add convert status tree. Default FALSE – convert status added tree. ip_seqs OPTIONAL. vector sequence IDs correspond admission positive sequences. Default NULL – admission positive sequences plotted. dates OPTIONAL. named vector mapping sequence IDs dates. Default NULL – dates plotted. pt_trace OPTIONAL. matrix patient IDs row names dates column names. Default NULL – patient trace plotted.

title: Maps clusters onto a phylogenetic tree and visualizes them — plot_clusters_phylo
text: ggtree object clusters visualized tree.

what: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
text: Visualizes, cluster, maximum genetic distance within cluster minimum genetic distance isolate another cluster. Points y = x line clusters whose internal diversity exceeds separation nearest cluster.

title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
text: clusters vector named sequence IDs giving cluster sequence belongs . Singletons dropped; sequences still count unclustered isolates. snp_dist matrix SNP distances isolates. row/column names define full universe isolates, including assigned cluster.

title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-cluster genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_cluster_distance
text: ggplot object, suitable saving ggsave().

what: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-isolate genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_isolate_distance
title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-isolate genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_isolate_distance
text: Visualizes, cluster, maximum genetic distance within cluster minimum genetic distance isolate (including isolates assigned cluster). Points y = x line clusters whose internal diversity exceeds separation nearest neighbouring isolate.

Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-isolate genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_isolate_distance
text: clusters vector named sequence IDs giving cluster sequence belongs . Singletons dropped; sequences still count unclustered isolates. snp_dist matrix SNP distances isolates. row/column names define full universe isolates, including assigned cluster.

title: Plot max intra-cluster vs. min inter-isolate genetic distance. — plot_intra_vs_inter_isolate_distance
text: ggplot object, suitable saving ggsave().

Plots a heatmap of the Jaccard similarity between clusters created with two different methods. — plot_jaccard_similarity_heatmap

what: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
title: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
text: Renders core convert-weighted overlap figure: trace type violin permuted (null) pooled overlap fractions boxplot inside, observed pooled fraction red diamond, observed counts (n_overlap/n_converts) labelled violin. Violins filled overlap group (co-occurrence vs sequential). function draws core figure. Aggregation across clusters / sequence types, significance/p-value annotations, group dividers headers depend specific trace-type layout left caller compute add returned plot.

title: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
code: plot_overlap_perm_test(   perm_df,   obs_df,   title = "Overlap Permutation Test Results",   subtitle = NULL,   trace_labels = c(facility = "Facility", floor = "Floor", room = "Room", seq_facility =     "Facility", seq_floor = "Floor", seq_room = "Room"),   x_label = "Trace type",   y_label = "Fraction of converts with overlap (convert-weighted)" )

title: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
text: perm_df long data frame permuted (null) distribution columns trace_type (factor whose levels define x-axis order) overlap_fraction. One row per (trace type, permutation). obs_df data frame observed values one row per trace type: columns trace_type (factor levels perm_df), overlap_fraction, n_overlap n_converts. title Plot title. subtitle Plot subtitle. Defaults NULL (subtitle). trace_labels named character vector mapping trace_type levels x-axis labels. default maps facility/floor/room (seq_ counterparts) "Facility"/"Floor"/"Room". x_label, y_label Axis titles.

title: Plot overlap permutation test results as violin plots — plot_overlap_perm_test
text: ggplot object violin plots overlap type.

what: Create standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
title: Create standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
text: Generates combined legend plot trace locations, surveillance results, patient categories can saved separately main plot.

title: Create standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
code: plot_trace_phylo_legend(   trace_colors = paletteer_d("ggthemes::Classic_Cyclic"),   trace_labels = NULL,   surv_colors = c(neg = "blue", pos_nonclust = "red", pos_clust = "gold"),   label_colors = c(index = "red", `multiply-colonized-index` = "darkred", `weak-index` =     "orange", convert = "black", `adm-pos` = "forestgreen", `adm-pos-convert` = "blue",     `secondary-convert` = "grey", other = "purple"),   include_trace = TRUE,   include_surv = TRUE,   include_patient = TRUE,   title_size = 10,   text_size = 8,   key_size = 0.5,   layout = c("horizontal", "vertical") )

title: Create standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
text: trace_colors Color palette trace location values. match colors used plot_trace_phylo_tree(). trace_labels Character vector labels trace location. Length match trace_colors. surv_colors Named character vector colors surveillance types. Default matches plot_trace_phylo_tree() defaults. label_colors Named character vector colors patient category labels. Default matches plot_trace_phylo_tree() defaults. include_trace Logical. Include trace location legend. Default TRUE. include_surv Logical. Include surveillance legend. Default TRUE. include_patient Logical. Include patient category legend. Default TRUE. title_size Numeric. Font size legend titles. Default 10. text_size Numeric. Font size legend text. Default 8. key_size Numeric. Size legend keys cm. Default 0.5. layout Character. Layout direction combining legends. "horizontal" places legends side--side (default), "vertical" stacks one .

title: Create standalone legend for trace phylogeny plots — plot_trace_phylo_legend
text: ggplot object containing legend(s), suitable saving ggsave().

what: Plots a phylogeny with presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance cell overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
title: Plots a phylogeny with presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance cell overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
text: Creates combined visualization phylogenetic tree patient presence/absence trace heatmap. Surveillance data encoded directly cell colors (dots). Use dark gray presence, white absence, surveillance colors results.

title: Plots a phylogeny with presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance cell overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
code: plot_trace_phylo_presence(   tree,   isolate_lookup,   trace_data,   surv_df,   cluster_filter = NULL,   presence_color = "gray85",   surv_colors = c(neg = "blue", pos = "red") )

title: Plots a phylogeny with presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance cell overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
text: tree phylogenetic tree object class phylo. isolate_lookup data frame get_isolate_lookup() containing columns: isolate_id, patient_id, date, cluster, adm_pos, prev_surv. trace_data matrix patient IDs row names dates (numeric) column names. Values binary (0=absent, 1=present). surv_df data frame surveillance data containing columns: patient_id, genome_id, surv_date, result (0/1 negative/positive). cluster_filter Numeric vector cluster IDs include, NULL clusters. presence_color Color presence cells. Default "gray85" (light gray). surv_colors Named character vector colors surveillance types: neg (negative) pos (positive).

title: Plots a phylogeny with presence/absence trace heatmap and surveillance cell overlay — plot_trace_phylo_presence
text: ggplot object combined tree, heatmap, surveillance overlay.

what: Plots a phylogeny with trace heatmap using ggtree with consistent sizing — plot_trace_phylo_tree
title: Plots a phylogeny with trace heatmap using ggtree with consistent sizing — plot_trace_phylo_tree
text: Creates combined visualization phylogenetic tree patient location trace heatmap. Uses ggtree phylogeny continuous line segments trace data (discrete cells). Surveillance data overlaid dots.

title: Plots a phylogeny with trace heatmap using ggtree with consistent sizing — plot_trace_phylo_tree
code: plot_trace_phylo_tree(   tree,   isolate_lookup,   trace_data,   surv_df,   cluster_filter = NULL,   trace_colors = paletteer_d("ggthemes::Classic_Cyclic"),   surv_colors = c(neg = "blue", pos_nonclust = "red", pos_clust = "gold"),   clust_patient_categories = NULL,   label_colors = c(index = "red", `multiply-colonized-index` = "darkred", `weak-index` =     "orange", convert = "black", `adm-pos` = "forestgreen", `adm-pos-convert` = "blue",     `secondary-convert` = "grey", other = "purple"),   inches_per_row = 0.2,   row_thickness = 0.4,   max_tree_width = 0.08 )

title: Plots a phylogeny with trace heatmap using ggtree with consistent sizing — plot_trace_phylo_tree
text: tree phylogenetic tree object class phylo. isolate_lookup data frame get_isolate_lookup() containing columns: isolate_id, patient_id, date, cluster, adm_pos, prev_surv. trace_data matrix patient IDs row names dates (numeric) column names. Values numeric categories (0=absent, 1+=location categories). surv_df data frame surveillance data containing columns: patient_id, genome_id, surv_date, result (0/1 negative/positive). cluster_filter Numeric vector cluster IDs include, NULL clusters. trace_colors Color palette trace location values. surv_colors Named character vector colors surveillance types: neg (negative), pos_clust (positive cluster), pos_nonclust (positive non-cluster). clust_patient_categories Named list cluster_patient_categorization(). element named vector mapping patient_id category. NULL, patients labeled "". label_colors Named character vector colors patient category labels. Categories cluster_patient_categorization: index, multiply-colonized-index, weak-index, convert, adm-pos, adm-pos-convert, secondary-convert, . inches_per_row Height inches allocated per patient row saving. Default 0.2. Use control visual thickness rows output. row_thickness Proportion row spacing used trace bar height. Default 0.4. max_tree_width Maximum width tree proportion time range. Default 0.08. Tree branch lengths scaled fit within width.

title: Plots a phylogeny with trace heatmap using ggtree with consistent sizing — plot_trace_phylo_tree
text: ggplot object following attributes consistent sizing: recommended_height: Suggested height inches recommended_width: Suggested width inches n_patients: Number patients plot inches_per_row: Height allocated per patient row Use saving ggsave() maintain consistent row heights.
